zh.Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可
英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾斯頓
zh.Blankney, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾布藍可尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Clinton於1354年出生在英國瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可時，他的父親John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton11351歲，母親Idonea de Saye26歲。他於大約1376年與Elizabeth Deincourt在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾布藍可尼結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1383年10月25日在他的家鄉享年29歲。

zh-hans.Blankney, Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾布藍可尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Clinton于1354年出生在英国瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可时，他的父亲John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton11351岁，母亲Idonea de Saye26岁。他于大约1376年与Elizabeth Deincourt在英国英格兰林可爾史爾布藍可尼结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1383年10月25日在他的家乡享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Louth, Westmeath) and Scottish: shortened form of   McClinton  .

English: habitational name, either from Glympton in Oxfordshire, named as ‘settlement (Old English tūn) on the Glym river’, a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright stream’, or from Glinton in Northamptonshire, early recorded as Clinton (named with an unrecorded Old English element akin to Middle Low German glinde ‘enclosure, fence’ + Old English tūn). The surname was taken to Ireland in or before the 16th century.

History: Charles Clinton (born 1690 in Longford, Ireland) organized a group of colonists and founded the settlement of Little Britain, Ulster County, NY, in 1731. His son George Clinton (1739–1812) was governor of NY (1777–95), and they had many prominent descendants. — An English aristocratic family called Clinton was founded by Geoffrey de Clinton (flourished 1130), who held lands at Glympton, Oxfordshire. He was chamberlain and treasurer to Henry I (1100–35).

variants.name: McClinton
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Fhionntain (Scottish), Mac Giolla Fhionntáin (Irish) ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Fionntan’, whose name has been explained as ‘the white ancient’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Clinton was born in 1354, in Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England, his father, John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton, was 11351 and his mother, Idonea de Saye, was 26. He married Elizabeth Deincourt about 1376, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 October 1383, in his hometown, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Clinton est né en 1354, à Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton, avait 11351 ans et sa mère, Idonea de Saye, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Deincourt environ 1376, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1383, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Clinton 1354 in Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton 11351 und seine Mutter Idonea de Saye 26. Er hat um 1376 in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Deincourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1383 im Alter von 29 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Clinton è nato il nel 1354 nel Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton, aveva 11351 anni e il suo madre, Idonea de Saye, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Deincourt circa 1376, nel Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 ottobre 1383, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Clintonが1354年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアマクスストクで生まれた時，父John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clintonは11351歳，母Idonea de Sayeは26歳であった。約1376年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーでElizabeth Deincourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1383年10月25日に故郷で29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Clinton(이)가 1354년 영국 워윅실르 맥스스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton(은)는 11351세였고, 그의 어머니 Idonea de Saye(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 블랭니에서 Elizabeth Deincourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1383년 10월 25일 그의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Clinton nasceu em 1354, em Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton, tinha 11351 anos e sua mãe, Idonea de Saye, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Deincourt aproximadamente 1376, em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1383, em sua cidade natal, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Clinton родился в 1354 г. в местности макссток, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton было 11351 год, а матери, которую звали Idonea de Saye, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Deincourt около 1376 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 октября 1383 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Clinton nació en 1354, en Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Clinton 3rd Lord Clinton, tenía 11351 años y su mamá, Idonea de Saye, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Deincourt aproximadamente 1376, en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1383, en su pueblo, a la edad de 29 años.
